description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:lts-alpine Docker image and defines two stages: test and pages. In the test stage add a test job that runs apk update, apk add make g++ python lsof, npm install --build-from-source, apk add tidyhtml && cp $(which tidy) node_modules/htmltidy/bin/linux, and npm start test.coverage. Also in the test stage add a test-update job that runs only on scheduled pipelines and executes apk update, apk add make g++ python lsof, npm install --build-from-source, apk add tidyhtml && cp $(which tidy) node_modules/htmltidy/bin/linux, npm install npm-check-updates, rm package-lock.json, ./node_modules/.bin/ncu -u, and npm start test.coverage. In the pages stage add a pages job that runs only on the master branch, runs apk update, apk add make g++ python, npm install jsdoc nps nps-utils lodash ink-docstrap, npm start jsdoc, moves the generated docs to a public directory, and publishes the public/ folder as a GitLab Pages artifact.
